LLMs \u00b7 BYOK.name: RailCall MCP → Claude / Cursor
LLMs \u00b7 BYOK.hint: Point your Claude/Cursor MCP config at this local server — stay on YOUR model + key.

Code & Repos.name: GitHub
Code & Repos.hint: PAT with `repo` (private) or `public_repo` (public) scope. Cap-off workflow opens ONE issue on the connected repo; rollback closes it (GitHub keeps closed issues visible).

Messaging & Email.name: Email · SMTP (BYOK)
Messaging & Email.hint: Your own SMTP creds, stored locally (0600). Set DRY_RUN=1 to compose+approve WITHOUT sending.

Webhooks & Events.name: Webhook · outgoing
Webhooks & Events.hint: POST governed events to any URL — every send still crosses the Approval Airlock.

Webhooks & Events.name: Webhook · incoming
Webhooks & Events.hint: Receive events into a workflow over a local loopback path.

CRM & Automation.name: Salesforce
CRM & Automation.hint: Read/write Salesforce records — every write crosses the Approval Airlock.

CRM & Automation.name: Airtable
CRM & Automation.hint: Read a base / append rows. Token stored locally · 0600.

CRM & Automation.name: Google Sheets
CRM & Automation.hint: Read + write cells through the Approval Airlock. Token stored locally · 0600.

CRM & Automation.name: Zapier
CRM & Automation.hint: Trigger a Zap via a catch-hook URL — governed + receipted.

CRM & Automation.name: Make (Integromat)
CRM & Automation.hint: Fire a Make custom webhook module — governed + receipted.

CRM & Automation.name: n8n
CRM & Automation.hint: Fire an n8n webhook trigger — governed + receipted.

CRM & Automation.name: Pipedream
CRM & Automation.hint: Fire a Pipedream HTTP trigger — governed + receipted.

Comms.name: Slack
Comms.hint: Bot token (xoxb-…) with chat:write scope. SLACK_DEFAULT_CHANNEL is either a channel id (C…) or #channel-name. Cap-off workflow posts ONE message; rollback deletes it (Slack shows a 'message was deleted' placeholder — audit trail intact).

Comms.name: Discord
Comms.hint: Webhook URL (Server → Integrations → Webhooks → 'Copy Webhook URL'). Cap-off posts one message; rollback DELETEs it from the channel.

Docs & Workspace.name: Notion
Docs & Workspace.hint: Internal integration token (secret_… or ntn_…) with the target database SHARED to the integration. Cap-off workflow appends ONE row; rollback archives it (Notion trash — restorable, honest audit trail).

Payments.name: Stripe
Payments.hint: sk_test_* keys only (primitive refuses sk_live_*). Cap-off workflow creates ONE $1 test-mode PaymentIntent using pm_card_visa; rollback refunds it.
